mads.note: The Bibliothèque de l'EFEO (Paris) maintains estampages.efeo.fr, the union catalogue of c. 4,000+ Chinese ink rubbings across seven European holders (EFEO, Musée Guimet, IHEC/Collège de France, Société asiatique, Bodleian, British Library, Rietberg) — an aggregator, not the original holding institution. HTML search only.
